title:
PROMPT 024: Trophy вЂ” Winner / Achievement
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
CANVAS: 1920Г—1080px (16:9)
DURATION: 3.2s | LOOP: No
SVG: Trophy cup (9 paths: cup body, two handle arcs, base rectangle, stem, lid/top arc, 3 sparkle star shapes around cup) вЂ” centered 960Г—500px, 130px tall

COLOR SPECIFICATION:
Background: #1C1917 (very dark warm black)
Trophy body fill: #FBBF24 (gold)
Trophy stroke: #D97706 (darker amber, 2px)
Handle fill: #F59E0B (medium gold)
Base fill: #92400E (brown)
Sparkles fill: #FEF08A (light yellow)
Glow: #FBBF2466 (gold, 40% opacity)

VISUAL LAYOUT:
Trophy centered. Sparkles positioned: top-left of cup (880Г—380px), top-right (1040Г—380px), upper-right far (1080Г—420px). All sparkles are 3-point or 4-point star shapes, 20вЂ“28px.

ANIMATION TIMELINE (3.2s total):
0вЂ“0.5s: Trophy base appears first (scale 0 в†’ 1.0, ease-out spring). Then stem, then body, then handles, then lid вЂ” each 0.1s stagger, spring.
0.5вЂ“1.0s: Trophy shines вЂ” diagonal light scan (white diagonal highlight strip, 3px, sweeps from bottom-left to top-right, opacity 0 в†’ 0.7 в†’ 0, ease-in-out).
1.0вЂ“1.5s: Sparkle 1 pops (scale 0 в†’ 1.2 в†’ 1.0, spring, #FEF08A).
1.2вЂ“1.7s: Sparkle 2 pops (stagger).
1.4вЂ“1.9s: Sparkle 3 pops (stagger).
1.9вЂ“2.3s: Gold glow expands from trophy base (blur 0 в†’ 25px, opacity 0 в†’ 0.5 в†’ 0).
2.3вЂ“2.7s: Trophy scales 1.0 в†’ 1.06 в†’ 1.0 (celebration pulse).
2.7вЂ“3.2s: Hold. Sparkles slowly fade (opacity 1.0 в†’ 0.3, ease-in).

EASING CURVES:
- Assembly: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)
- Shine scan: ease-in-out
- Sparkle: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)
- Glow: ease-in-out
